annotations.label: Chi-squared as special case of gamma/Wishart

anchor.snippet: is a special case of the gamma distribution and the univariate Wishart distribution

anchor.snippet: The distribution of the random variable

annotations.note: No lemma identifies the pushforward of a standard Gaussian under squaring as a chi-squared/gamma measure in Mathlib.

annotations.note: No chi-squared CDF is defined; Mathlib has a general cdf and cdf_gammaMeasure_eq_integral but no chi-squared specialization.

annotations.note: Mathlib has generic subgaussian/moment machinery in Mathlib.Probability.Moments but no Chernoff tail bound stated for chi-squared.

annotations.note: No chi-squared distribution and no computed differential entropy formula for it appears in Mathlib.

annotations.note: No maximum-entropy characterization for chi-squared is present in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Cumulants of chi-squared

annotations.note: No cumulants of the chi-squared distribution are computed in Mathlib.

annotations.note: Laurent–Massart chi-squared concentration bounds are not stated in Mathlib.

annotations.note: No CLT specialization to the chi-squared distribution exists in Mathlib (no chi-squared object to converge).

annotations.label: Wilson-Hilferty transformation

anchor.snippet: This is known as the Wilson–Hilferty transformation

annotations.note: Wilson–Hilferty cube-root normal approximation is not in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Squared norm of k standard normals is chi-squared

anchor.snippet: The squared norm of k standard normally distributed variables is a chi-squared distribution with k degrees of freedom

annotations.note: No lemma links the squared Euclidean norm of iid standard Gaussians to a chi-squared/gamma distribution in Mathlib.

annotations.note: Mathlib has no such definition of the chi-squared distribution.

annotations.label: Quadratic form of Gaussian vector is chi-squared

anchor.snippet: is chi-squared distributed with

annotations.note: No distributional result about Gaussian quadratic forms being chi-squared is present in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Noncentral chi-squared distribution

anchor.snippet: yields a generalization of the chi-squared distribution called the noncentral chi-squared distribution

annotations.note: Noncentral chi-squared distribution is not defined in Mathlib (grep for 'noncentral' finds only Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/Center.lean).

annotations.label: Quadratic form with idempotent matrix is chi-square

anchor.snippet: symmetric , idempotent matrix with rank

annotations.note: This special case of Cochran's theorem is not formalized in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Ratio of chi-squared variables is F-distributed

annotations.note: Neither the chi-squared nor the F-distribution is defined in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Linear combination as generalized chi-squared

anchor.snippet: is a special case of the generalized chi-squared distribution

annotations.note: The generalized chi-squared distribution is not defined in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Noncentral chi-squared distribution

anchor.snippet: is obtained from the sum of the squares of independent Gaussian random variables having unit variance and nonzero means

annotations.note: No noncentral chi-squared distribution is defined in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Generalized chi-squared distribution

anchor.snippet: is obtained from the quadratic form z'Az where z is a zero-mean Gaussian vector

annotations.note: No generalized chi-squared distribution is defined in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Chi-squared as special case of gamma distribution

anchor.snippet: is a special case of the gamma distribution

annotations.note: Mathlib defines the general gamma measure but does not identify chi-squared as its specialization at shape k/2, rate 1/2.

annotations.label: Exponential as special case

anchor.snippet: Because the exponential distribution is also a special case of the gamma distribution

annotations.note: Exponential and gamma measures both exist in Mathlib but their identification as gamma with shape 1 is not proven as a lemma.

annotations.label: Erlang as special case

anchor.snippet: The Erlang distribution is also a special case of the gamma distribution

annotations.note: The Erlang distribution is not defined in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Concentration of squared Gaussian vector length

anchor.snippet: the squared length of the vector is concentrated tightly around

annotations.note: No concentration inequality for the squared norm of a Gaussian vector appears in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Fisher's square-root normal approximation

anchor.snippet: is approximately normally distributed with mean

annotations.note: Fisher's √(2χ²) − √(2k−1) approximation is not stated in Mathlib.

annotations.note: Neither the chi distribution nor its relation to chi-squared is in Mathlib.

annotations.note: The Rayleigh distribution is not defined in Mathlib.

annotations.note: The inverse-chi-squared distribution is not defined in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Chi-squared as type III Pearson distribution

anchor.snippet: The chi-squared distribution is a special case of type III Pearson distribution

annotations.note: Pearson type III distributions are not defined in Mathlib.

annotations.note: The beta distribution is defined (Mathlib.Probability.Distributions.Beta) but no result deriving it from a ratio of chi-squared variables is present.
